message:
✨ Add friendly 404 page with feature request CTA (#9684)

Replace the silent redirect-to-home catch-all route with a designed
NotFound page that:
- Shows the attempted path and explains it doesn't exist yet
- Encourages users to open a feature request (pre-filled GitHub issue)
- Highlights KubeStellar's fast AI-powered iteration cycle
- Provides quick-links to popular pages (Dashboard, Clusters, etc.)
- Includes Go Back and Home navigation buttons
- Uses animated compass icon and purple gradient theme

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,118 @@ +/** + * NotFound — Friendly 404 page for unrecognised routes. + * + * Shown when a visitor hits a URL that doesn't match any known route + * (e.g. /compliance-frameworks before the feature ships). + * + * Rather than a cold "404" error, it: + * - Explains the page doesn't exist (yet!) + * - Links popular destinations so users can self-navigate + * - Offers a one-click feature request (opens the in-app form or GitHub) + * - Highlights KubeStellar's fast iteration culture + */ +import { useLocation, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' +import { Compass, Home, Rocket, MessageSquarePlus, ArrowLeft, Sparkles, LayoutDashboard, Shield, Server, Zap } from 'lucide-react' +import { ROUTES } from '../config/routes' + +const QUICK_LINKS = [ + { label: 'Dashboard', path: ROUTES.HOME, icon: LayoutDashboard }, + { label: 'Clusters', path: ROUTES.CLUSTERS, icon: Server }, + { label: 'Compliance', path: ROUTES.COMPLIANCE, icon: Shield }, + { label: 'Deploy', path: ROUTES.DEPLOY, icon: Zap }, + { label: 'Marketplace', path: ROUTES.MARKETPLACE, icon: Rocket }, + { label: 'Cost', path: ROUTES.COST, icon: Sparkles }, +] + +export default function NotFound() { + const location = useLocation() + const navigate = useNavigate() + const path = location.pathname + + const featureRequestUrl = + `https://github.com/kubestellar/console/issues/new?` + + `template=feature_request.md&title=${encodeURIComponent(`Feature request: ${path}`)}&` + + `labels=enhancement&body=${encodeURIComponent( + `## Feature Request\n\nI visited \`${path}\` and expected to find a page here.\n\n` + + `### What I was looking for\n\n_Describe the feature or page you expected to see._\n\n` + + `### Why it would be useful\n\n_How would this help your workflow?_` + )}` + + return ( +
+
+ {/* Animated compass icon */} +
+
+ +
+ + {/* Main message */} +
+

+ Page not found +

+

+ {path} + {' '}doesn't exist yet — but it could! +

+
+ + {/* Feature request CTA */} +
+
+ + Ship it in hours, not months +
+

+ KubeStellar Console uses AI-powered repo automation to go from feature + request to production in hours. Open an issue and watch the magic happen. +

+ + + Request this feature + +
+ + {/* Quick links */} +
+

Popular pages

+
+ {QUICK_LINKS.map(({ label, path: to, icon: Icon }) => ( + + ))} +
+
+ + {/* Navigation buttons */} +
+ + +
+
+
+ ) +}
